arguments.argument: if oPlayer1.attackState=oPlayer1.ACT_IN_BIKE and bJumpedOut=0 { with oPlayer1 { setCollisionBounds(-8,-40,8,-1) attackState=0 yVel=-8; yAcc=-8 maxSlope=4; maxDownSlope=8 } oBikeViewFollow.viewProg=1 x=oPlayer1.x; y=oPlayer1.y image_yscale=1 sprite_index=sJerryBike bJumpedOut=1 }
